api.name: CapacitorDownloaderPlugin
api.docs:
Capacitor plugin for downloading files with background support.
Provides resumable downloads with progress tracking.

tags.name: param
tags.text: options - Download configuration

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise with initial download task status

tags.name: example

methods.name: pause

parameters.name: options
parameters.docs: - Options containing the download task ID

tags.name: param
tags.text: options - Options containing the download task ID

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves when paused

methods.docs:
Pause an active download.
Download can be resumed later from the same position.

methods.name: resume

parameters.name: options
parameters.docs: - Options containing the download task ID

tags.name: param
tags.text: options - Options containing the download task ID

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves when resumed

methods.docs:
Resume a paused download.
Continues from where it was paused.

methods.name: stop

parameters.name: options
parameters.docs: - Options containing the download task ID

tags.name: param
tags.text: options - Options containing the download task ID

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves when stopped

methods.docs:
Stop and cancel a download permanently.
Downloaded data will be deleted.

methods.name: checkStatus

parameters.name: options
parameters.docs: - Options containing the download task ID

tags.name: param
tags.text: options - Options containing the download task ID

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise with current download task status

methods.docs: Check the current status of a download.

methods.name: getFileInfo
methods.signature: (options: { path: string; }) => Promise<{ size: number; type: string; }>

tags.name: param
tags.text: options - Options containing the file path

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise with file size and MIME type

methods.docs: Get information about a downloaded file.

methods.name: addListener
methods.signature: (eventName: 'downloadProgress', listenerFunc: (progress: { id: string; progress: number; }) => void) => Promise<PluginListenerHandle>

tags.name: param
tags.text: eventName - Must be 'downloadProgress'

tags.name: param
tags.text: listenerFunc - Callback receiving progress updates

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise with listener handle for removal

tags.name: example

methods.docs:
Listen for download progress updates.
Fired periodically as download progresses.

methods.name: addListener

tags.name: param
tags.text: eventName - Must be 'downloadCompleted'

tags.name: param
tags.text: listenerFunc - Callback receiving completion notification

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise with listener handle for removal

methods.docs:
Listen for download completion.
Fired when a download finishes successfully.

methods.name: addListener
methods.signature: (eventName: 'downloadFailed', listenerFunc: (error: { id: string; error: string; }) => void) => Promise<PluginListenerHandle>

tags.name: param
tags.text: eventName - Must be 'downloadFailed'

tags.name: param
tags.text: listenerFunc - Callback receiving error information

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise with listener handle for removal

methods.docs:
Listen for download failures.
Fired when a download encounters an error.

methods.name: removeAllListeners

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise that resolves when all listeners removed

methods.docs:
Remove all event listeners.
Cleanup method to prevent memory leaks.

tags.name: returns
tags.text: Promise with version string

interfaces.name: DownloadTask
interfaces.docs: Represents the current state and progress of a download task.

properties.name: id
properties.docs: Unique identifier for the download task

interfaces.name: DownloadOptions
interfaces.docs: Configuration options for starting a download.

properties.name: id
properties.docs: Unique identifier for this download task

properties.name: url
properties.docs: URL of the file to download

properties.name: destination
properties.docs: Local file path where the download will be saved

properties.name: headers
properties.docs: Optional HTTP headers to include in the request
